user_query: I'm a finance student and I'm interested in the performance of major global indices and commodities.

TaskList.description: Query the performance indicators of major global indices on different time frames: daily, one-week, one-month, year-to-date, one-year, and three-year.
Retrieve the major commodities and their technical indicators.
Get the performance metrics of major commodities on an hourly, daily, weekly, and monthly basis.
